title: FOV and POV commands
body:
A Minecraft Fabric mod that adds client-side commands for adjusting Field of View (FOV) and Point of View (POV) settings.

## Features

### FOV Command
- `/fov <value>` - Set your field of view to a specific value (30-110)
- Example: `/fov 90` sets FOV to 90 degrees

### POV Command
- `/pov first_person` - Switch to first person view
- `/pov third_person_back` - Switch to third person view (behind player)
- `/pov third_person_front` - Switch to third person view (in front of player)
